name: AWS
summary: Query AWS resources + docs (read-first) for projects with AWS infra.
description: Inspect AWS resources and search AWS documentation via MCP. For AWS-hosted projects, gives agents grounded infra visibility. Uses the official awslabs MCP servers. (This project ships on Cloudflare, so AWS is niche unless a deployment uses it.)

requires.label: An AWS profile/role -- prefer a READ-ONLY, least-privilege profile
